IfcRelAggregates.summary: Decomposition relation connecting a semantic parent to aggregated children such as roof slabs, project hierarchy nodes, or infrastructure parts.
queryPatterns: MATCH (parent)<--(rel:IfcRelAggregates)-->(child) RETURN id(rel) AS node_id, parent.Name AS parent_name, child.Name AS child_name LIMIT 24
cautions: The relation itself is structural, not renderable geometry.

IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure.summary: Containment relation between products and spatial containers such as buildings or storeys.
queryPatterns: MATCH (container)<--(rel:IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure)-->(element) RETURN id(rel) AS node_id, container.Name AS container_name, element.Name AS element_name LIMIT 24
cautions: Use it for hierarchy explanations, not as direct evidence of visibility.

IfcRelDefinesByType.summary: Type attachment relation, useful when an instance label is weak and the attached type carries the meaning.
queryPatterns: MATCH (instance)<--(rel:IfcRelDefinesByType)-->(type) RETURN id(rel) AS node_id, instance.Name AS instance_name, type.Name AS type_name LIMIT 24
cautions: Prefer this when raw instance properties are generic or opaque.

IfcRelDefinesByProperties.summary: Property-set attachment relation between objects and property definitions.
queryPatterns: MATCH (instance)<--(rel:IfcRelDefinesByProperties)-->(definition) RETURN id(rel) AS node_id, instance.Name AS instance_name, definition.Name AS definition_name LIMIT 24
cautions: Property definitions may need a second inspection step for details.

IfcRelAssociatesMaterial.summary: Material association relation between products and materials or intermediate material-definition nodes.
queryPatterns: MATCH (rel:IfcRelAssociatesMaterial)--(other) RETURN DISTINCT labels(other)[0] AS node_label, count(*) AS connections ORDER BY connections DESC LIMIT 24
MATCH (:IfcRelAssociatesMaterial)--(material:IfcMaterial) RETURN DISTINCT material.Name AS material_name LIMIT 24
cautions: A direct IfcMaterial hop may be absent even when intermediate material-definition nodes exist.

RELATED_OBJECTS.summary: Common role from aggregate, type, property, and material relations toward the participating product objects.
queryPatterns: MATCH (rel)-[:RELATED_OBJECTS]->(other) RETURN labels(rel)[0] AS relation_label, labels(other)[0] AS other_label, count(*) AS connections ORDER BY connections DESC LIMIT 24
cautions: Inspect the relation node label too; the role name alone is too broad.

RELATED_ELEMENTS.summary: Containment/connectivity role from relation nodes toward participating product elements.
queryPatterns: MATCH (rel)-[:RELATED_ELEMENTS]->(other) RETURN labels(rel)[0] AS relation_label, labels(other)[0] AS other_label, count(*) AS connections ORDER BY connections DESC LIMIT 24
cautions: Use the relation node label to distinguish containment from connectivity.
